testcase.name: 5a. Analysis API: index returns 9 weeks
5b. Analysis API: latest week JSON has all sections
testcase.system-out: [OK] Weekly summary: "Resumen Semanal del USD/COP (Semana 9 de 2026)..." [OK] Daily entries: 5 days [OK] Macro snapshots: dxy, vix, wti, embi_col, ust10y, ibr, gold, brent [OK] Macro charts: 8 variables, 82+ data points each

testcase.name: 5c. Analysis API: DXY technical indicators valid
5d. Analysis API: all 9 weeks load
testcase.system-out: [OK] All 9 weeks loaded: W01: 5 days, 8 vars W02: 5 days, 8 vars W03: 5 days, 8 vars W04: 5 days, 8 vars W05: 5 days, 8 vars W06: 5 days, 8 vars W07: 5 days, 8 vars W08: 5 days, 8 vars W09: 5 days, 8 vars

testcase.name: 5e. Analysis API: calendar endpoint
5f. Analysis page renders content (not stuck loading)
5g. Analysis: SEMANA week selector visible
5h. Analysis: macro Recharts SVGs render
5i. Analysis: daily timeline has entries
5j. Analysis: week navigation prev/next works
5k. Analysis: full page screenshot
Analysis Deep Validation › Analysis page renders fully with data
testcase.system-out: Console errors (5): 1. WebSocket connection to 'ws://localhost:8000/ws' failed: Error in connection establishment: net::ERR_CONNECTION_REFUSED 2. WebSocket connection to 'ws://localhost:8000/socket.io/?EIO=4&transport=websocket' failed: Error in connection establishment: net::ERR_CONNECTION_REFUSED 3. WebSocket connection to 'ws://localhost:8000/ws' failed: Error in connection establishment: net::ERR_CONNECTION_REFUSED 4. WebSocket connection to 'ws://localhost:8000/socket.io/?EIO=4&transport=websocket' failed: Error in connection establishment: net::ERR_CONNECTION_REFUSED 5. WebSocket connection to 'ws://localhost:8000/ws' failed: Error in connection establishment: net::ERR_CONNECTION_REFUSED [OK] Week selector [OK] Analysis content

testcase.name: Analysis Deep Validation › Dashboard loads with full backtest data
Analysis Deep Validation › Production page loads with 2026 data
/analysis page — API Validation › analysis index returns 7+ weeks
/analysis page — API Validation › weekly data W07 has all sections populated
/analysis page — API Validation › DXY snapshot has valid technical indicators
/analysis page — API Validation › all 7 weekly files load successfully
/analysis page — API Validation › calendar endpoint responds
/analysis page — UI Rendering › page renders with analysis content (not stuck loading)
/analysis page — UI Rendering › week selector shows SEMANA with correct week number
/analysis page — UI Rendering › 8 macro charts are visible
testcase.failure:
[chromium] › analysis-page-validation.spec.ts:108:7 › /analysis page — UI Rendering › 8 macro charts are visible
Error: expect(locator).toBeVisible() failed
Locator: locator('text=Graficos Macro') Expected: visible Timeout: 20000ms Error: element(s) not found
Call log: - Expect "toBeVisible" with timeout 20000ms - waiting for locator('text=Graficos Macro')
111 | // Wait for charts section 112 | const chartsTitle = page.locator('text=Graficos Macro'); > 113 | await expect(chartsTitle).toBeVisible({ timeout: 20000 }); | ^ 114 | 115 | // Check for individual chart labels 116 | const chartNames = ['DXY', 'VIX', 'WTI', 'EMBI', 'Treasury 10Y', 'IBR', 'Oro', 'Brent']; at C:\Users\pedro\OneDrive\Documents\ALGO TRADING\USDCOP\USDCOP-RL-Models\usdcop-trading-dashboard\tests\e2e\analysis-page-validation.spec.ts:113:31

testcase.name: /analysis page — UI Rendering › Recharts SVG elements render in chart grid
/analysis page — UI Rendering › daily timeline section is rendered
/analysis page — UI Rendering › macro snapshot bar shows indicator values
/analysis page — UI Rendering › floating chat widget is visible
/analysis page — UI Rendering › week navigation changes displayed data
/analysis page — UI Rendering › full page screenshot captures complete analysis
Full Visual Validation Screenshots › 05 - Analysis page week 9 (latest)
testcase.failure:
[chromium] › full-screenshots.spec.ts:32:7 › Full Visual Validation Screenshots › 05 - Analysis page week 9 (latest)
TimeoutError: page.goto: Timeout 30000ms exceeded. Call log: - navigating to "http://localhost:5000/analysis", waiting until "networkidle"
